title: Housing.com International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Housing.com International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Housing.com International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Housing.com International Enterprises:
Housing.com International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com International Enterprises!
